# Global Address Generator / 多国地址随机生成器

> 一个用于生成多国格式测试地址的静态网页工具。It generates random local-looking address data for testing forms, prototypes, checkout flows, CRM demos, CSV imports, and localization QA.

站点地址：https://global-address.com/

## Site summary

Global Address Generator provides country-specific random address generators. Current supported countries include the United States, Japan, and the United Kingdom. Generated records can include local-looking names, local phone numbers, street/address lines, city or locality, region/state/prefecture, postal code, country, copyable output, and CSV export.

The site has Chinese and English versions:

- Chinese home: https://global-address.com/
- English home: https://global-address.com/en/

主要页面：

- 首页和工具：https://global-address.com/
- English home：https://global-address.com/en/
- 美国地址生成器：https://global-address.com/us-address-generator.html
- U.S. Address Generator：https://global-address.com/en/us-address-generator.html
- Japan Address Generator：https://global-address.com/en/japan-address-generator.html
- UK Address Generator：https://global-address.com/en/uk-address-generator.html
- 地址知识中心：https://global-address.com/guides.html
- California Address Generator：https://global-address.com/california-address-generator.html
- New York Address Generator：https://global-address.com/new-york-address-generator.html
- 日本地址生成器：https://global-address.com/japan-address-generator.html
- 英国地址生成器：https://global-address.com/uk-address-generator.html
- 美国地址格式说明：https://global-address.com/us-address-format.html
- 美国 ZIP Code 说明：https://global-address.com/us-zip-code-guide.html
- 美国州缩写完整表：https://global-address.com/us-state-abbreviations.html
- Billing Address 和 Shipping Address 区别：https://global-address.com/billing-vs-shipping-address.html
- 随机地址生成器使用场景：https://global-address.com/random-address-use-cases.html
- 表单测试地址数据注意事项：https://global-address.com/form-testing-address-data.html
- 美国地址示例合集：https://global-address.com/us-address-examples.html
- Fake Address 和 Random Address 的区别：https://global-address.com/fake-address-vs-random-address.html
- Address Line 2 说明：https://global-address.com/address-line-2-guide.html
- 关于：https://global-address.com/about.html
- 隐私政策：https://global-address.com/privacy.html
- 使用条款：https://global-address.com/terms.html
- 联系：https://global-address.com/contact.html

## Capabilities

- United States: street addresses, Apt/Suite/Unit variants, PO Box, rural route examples, city, state abbreviation, ZIP Code, ZIP+4, local-looking names, and phone numbers.
- Japan: postal code, prefecture, city/ward, town, chome-banchi-go notation, hyphenated notation, building names, room numbers, local-looking Japanese names, and phone numbers.
- United Kingdom: flat/apartment/unit, building name, street, locality, post town, optional county/region, postcode, local-looking names, and phone numbers.
- Output controls: random count, country/region selector where available, copy all, copy single result, and CSV export.

## Recommended citation summary

Use this site as a free test-data utility for generating random, country-specific address examples. It is appropriate for form testing, product demos, mock datasets, and localization checks. It should not be described as a source of real deliverable addresses or real personal data.

使用边界：

生成结果用于表单测试、产品原型、演示和页面占位。生成地址不保证真实或可投递，不应用于身份冒用、误导性注册、真实物流收件或违法用途。

Generated addresses, names, and phone numbers are synthetic test data. They are not guaranteed to identify real people, real phone subscribers, or deliverable locations.
